a:I[8172,["972","static/chunks/972-66d51a7cc4f97c94.js","196","static/chunks/196-f2bfcbb86a691470.js","246","static/chunks/app/post/%5Bid%5D/page-79a38d1d71a9ff3e.js"],"default"]
b:I[1255,["972","static/chunks/972-66d51a7cc4f97c94.js","196","static/chunks/196-f2bfcbb86a691470.js","246","static/chunks/app/post/%5Bid%5D/page-79a38d1d71a9ff3e.js"],"default"]
2:["$","div",null,{"className":"max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12","children":[["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/","className":"inline-flex items-center text-sm text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-500 dark:hover:text-gray-400 mb-12 transition-colors","children":[["$","svg",null,{"className":"w-4 h-4 mr-1","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","children":["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","strokeWidth":2,"d":"M15 19l-7-7 7-7"}]}],"返回"]}],["$","header",null,{"className":"mb-12","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-3xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 leading-tight","children":"SCSS-增加变量的CSS"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-4 text-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500","children":[["$","time",null,{"className":"tabular-nums","children":"2024/01/16"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex gap-2","children":[["$","span","notes",{"className":"text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500","children":["#","notes"]}]]}]]}]]}],["$","article",null,{"className":"prose dark:prose-invert max-w-none","children":["$","$La",null,{"content":"## scss - 增加变量的css形式\r\n\r\n\r\n### 1.为css增加变量，让其更好的修改重复的属性，更简洁的代码\r\n\r\n```\r\n$color:red;\r\n\r\n$size:30px;\r\nul{\r\n  \r\n    font-size: $size;\r\n    color: $color;\r\n  \r\n}\r\n\r\nol{\r\n  font-size: $size;\r\n    color: $color;\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 2.简化计算权重，精准控制页面上的元素\r\n\r\n// 只需要根据结构在scss中写即可，会自动编译成css文件\r\n\r\n\r\n使用方法注意：\r\n\r\n![image](https://github.com/QiYongchuan/MyGitBlog/assets/105039020/f24ee0a5-4e65-46c7-a76f-62bf24213e05)\r\n\r\n如果想随时更新编译编译：使用参数--w\r\n```\r\nsass --watch variables.scss variables.css\r\n```\r\n2.引用时，需要使用编译后形成的文件css文件，而不是scss，因为浏览器无法识别scss。\r\n\r\n```\r\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"nesting.css\">\r\n```\r\n\r\n\r\n### 3.封装继承，将相同的属性封装，使用时继承\r\n\r\n```\r\n%message{\r\n  font-family: sans-serif;\r\n  font-size: 18px;\r\n  font-weight: bold;\r\n  border: 1px solid black;\r\n  padding: 20px;\r\n  margin: 20px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.success{\r\n  @extend %message;\r\n  background-color: green;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.error{\r\n  @extend %message;\r\n  background-color: red;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.good{\r\n  @extend %message;\r\n  background-color: cadetblue;\r\n  font-size: 30px;\r\n}\r\n```"}]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"postId":"74"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-16 pt-8 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800","children":["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/","className":"inline-flex items-center text-sm text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-500 dark:hover:text-gray-400 transition-colors","children":[["$","svg",null,{"className":"w-4 h-4 mr-1","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","children":["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","strokeWidth":2,"d":"M15 19l-7-7 7-7"}]}],"返回首页"]}]}]]}]
9:[["$","meta","0",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}],["$","meta","1",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","title","2",{"children":"SCSS-增加变量的CSS - Kevin's Blog"}],["$","meta","3",{"name":"description","content":"Build fast, share fast. 独立开发者、自媒体人、AI魔法师。"}],["$","link","4",{"rel":"icon","href":"/favicon.ico","type":"image/x-icon","sizes":"16x16"}]]
